name: Novetex Textiles
message: novetex.com zoominfo.com/c/novetex-textiles-ltd/105432365 Established in 1976 and part of the Novel Group, Novetex Textiles Limited is a leader in the textile industry, specializing in sustainable fiber and yarn development. The company excels in creating high-quality yarns and fashion collections that align with global trends and market demands. Its operations span multiple cities in China and Asia, serving a range of global high-profile brands. Novetex is committed to eco-friendly
